JavaScript string conversion and prototype method tests, including immutability and property manipulation.

## Folders
- **[15.05.01](15.05.01/README.md)**: JavaScript string conversion tests for various data types and values.
- **[15.05.02](15.05.02/README.md)**: JavaScript tests for `String.prototype` and property manipulation on String objects.
- **[15.05.03](15.05.03/README.md)**: Tests for the immutability, non-enumerability of the String prototype, and `String.fromCharCode()` function.
- **[15.05.04](15.05.04/README.md)**: JavaScript tests for String prototype methods including constructor, `toString`, `valueOf`, `charAt`, `charCodeAt`, `concat`, and `indexOf`.
